  @java.lang.Override
  public boolean equals(final java.lang.Object obj) {
    if (obj == this) {
     return true;
    }
    if (!(obj instanceof org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.PublishedConfig)) {
      return super.equals(obj);
    }
    org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.PublishedConfig other = (org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.PublishedConfig) obj;

    if (!getGroup()
        .equals(other.getGroup())) return false;
    if (!getConfigId()
        .equals(other.getConfigId())) return false;
    if (!getLayerId()
        .equals(other.getLayerId())) return false;
    if (!getSchemaKey()
        .equals(other.getSchemaKey())) return false;
    if (!getPublishedConfigId()
        .equals(other.getPublishedConfigId())) return false;
    if (!getEffectiveConfigId()
        .equals(other.getEffectiveConfigId())) return false;
    if (hasUpdatedTimeUtc() != other.hasUpdatedTimeUtc()) return false;
    if (hasUpdatedTimeUtc()) {
      if (!getUpdatedTimeUtc()
          .equals(other.getUpdatedTimeUtc())) return false;
    }
    if (!getUpdatedBySubject()
        .equals(other.getUpdatedBySubject())) return false;
    if (hasDeclared() != other.hasDeclared()) return false;
    if (hasDeclared()) {
      if (!getDeclared()
          .equals(other.getDeclared())) return false;
    }
    if (!getEffectiveList()
        .equals(other.getEffectiveList())) return false;
    if (!getUnknownFields().equals(other.getUnknownFields())) return false;
    return true;
  }

  public int hashCode() {

      return memoizedHashCode;
    }

    hash = (37 * hash) + GROUP_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + getGroup().hashCode();

    hash = (53 * hash) + getConfigId().hashCode();

      hash = (37 * hash) + DECLARED_FIELD_NUMBER;
      hash = (53 * hash) + getDeclared().hashCode();
    }
    if (getEffectiveCount() > 0) {
      hash = (37 * hash) + EFFECTIVE_FIELD_NUMBER;
      hash = (53 * hash) + getEffectiveList().hashCode();
    }
    hash = (29 * hash) + getUnknownFields().hashCode();
    memoizedHashCode = hash;
    return hash;
  }

      }
      if (other.hasUpdatedTimeUtc()) {
        mergeUpdatedTimeUtc(other.getUpdatedTimeUtc());
      }
      if (!other.getUpdatedBySubject().isEmpty()) {
        updatedBySubject_ = other.updatedBySubject_;
        bitField0_ |= 0x00000080;
        onChanged();
      }
      if (other.hasDeclared()) {
        mergeDeclared(other.getDeclared());
      }
      if (effectiveBuilder_ == null) {
        if (!other.effective_.isEmpty()) {
          if (effective_.isEmpty()) {
            effective_ = other.effective_;
            bitField0_ = (bitField0_ & ~0x00000200);
          } else {
            ensureEffectiveIsMutable();
            effective_.addAll(other.effective_);
          }
          onChanged();
        }
      } else {
        if (!other.effective_.isEmpty()) {
          if (effectiveBuilder_.isEmpty()) {
            effectiveBuilder_.dispose();
            effectiveBuilder_ = null;
            effective_ = other.effective_;
            bitField0_ = (bitField0_ & ~0x00000200);
            effectiveBuilder_ = 
              com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.alwaysUseFieldBuilders ?
                 internalGetEffectiveFieldBuilder() : null;
          } else {
            effectiveBuilder_.addAllMessages(other.effective_);
          }
        }
      }
      this.mergeUnknownFields(other.getUnknownFields());
      onChanged();
      return this;
    }

    @java.lang.Override
    public final boolean isInitialized() {
      return true;
    }

    @java.lang.Override
    public Builder mergeFrom(
        com.google.protobuf.CodedInputStream input,
        com.google.protobuf.ExtensionRegistryLite extensionRegistry)
        throws java.io.IOException {
      if (extensionRegistry == null) {
        throw new java.lang.NullPointerException();
      }
      try {
        boolean done = false;
        while (!done) {
          int tag = input.readTag();
          switch (tag) {
            case 0:
              done = true;
              break;
            case 10: {
              group_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000001;
              break;
            } // case 10
            case 18: {
              configId_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000002;
              break;
            } // case 18
            case 26: {
              layerId_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000004;
              break;
            } // case 26
            case 34: {
              schemaKey_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000008;
              break;
            } // case 34
            case 42: {
              publishedConfigId_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000010;
              break;
            } // case 42
            case 50: {
              effectiveConfigId_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000020;
              break;
            } // case 50
            case 58: {
              input.readMessage(
                  internalGetUpdatedTimeUtcFieldBuilder().getBuilder(),
                  extensionRegistry);
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000040;
              break;
            } // case 58
            case 66: {
              updatedBySubject_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000080;
              break;
            } // case 66
            case 74: {
              input.readMessage(
                  internalGetDeclaredFieldBuilder().getBuilder(),
                  extensionRegistry);
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000100;
              break;
            } // case 74
            case 82: {
              org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.EffectiveEntry m =
                  input.readMessage(
                      org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.EffectiveEntry.parser(),
                      extensionRegistry);
              if (effectiveBuilder_ == null) {
                ensureEffectiveIsMutable();
                effective_.add(m);
              } else {
                effectiveBuilder_.addMessage(m);
              }
              break;
            } // case 82
            default: {
              if (!super.parseUnknownField(input, extensionRegistry, tag)) {
                done = true; // was an endgroup tag
              }
              break;
            } // default:
          } // switch (tag)
        } // while (!done)
      } catch (com.google.protobuf.InvalidProtocolBufferException e) {
        throw e.unwrapIOException();
      } finally {
        onChanged();
      } // finally
      return this;
    }

          declared_ != null &&

    }

    hash = (37 * hash) + CONFIG_ID_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + getConfigId().hashCode();
    hash = (37 * hash) + LAYER_ID_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + getLayerId().hashCode();
    if (hasAtUtc()) {
      hash = (37 * hash) + AT_UTC_FIELD_NUMBER;
      hash = (53 * hash) + getAtUtc().hashCode();
    }
    hash = (29 * hash) + getUnknownFields().hashCode();
    memoizedHashCode = hash;
    return hash;

        .computeBoolSize(4, approvalRequired_);
    }
    if (mode_ != org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.ChangeMode.CHANGE_MODE_UNSPECIFIED.getNumber()) {
      size += com.google.protobuf.CodedOutputStream
        .computeEnumSize(5, mode_);

    if (((bitField0_ & 0x00000002) != 0)) {
      size += com.google.protobuf.CodedOutputStream
        .computeMessageSize(6, getEffectiveTimeUtc());
    }
    if (((bitField0_ & 0x00000004) != 0)) {
      size += com.google.protobuf.CodedOutputStream
        .computeMessageSize(7, getExpiresAtUtc());
    }
    if (!com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.isStringEmpty(comment_)) {
      size += com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.computeStringSize(8, comment_);
    }
    if (!com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.isStringEmpty(subject_)) {
      size += com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.computeStringSize(9, subject_);
    }
    size += getUnknownFields().getSerializedSize();
    memoizedSize = size;
    return size;
  }

  @java.lang.Override
  public boolean equals(final java.lang.Object obj) {
    if (obj == this) {
     return true;
    }
    if (!(obj instanceof org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.UpdateRequest)) {
      return super.equals(obj);
    }
    org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.UpdateRequest other = (org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.UpdateRequest) obj;

    if (!getConfigId()
        .equals(other.getConfigId())) return false;
    if (!getLayerId()
        .equals(other.getLayerId())) return false;
    if (hasDeclaredPayload() != other.hasDeclaredPayload()) return false;
    if (hasDeclaredPayload()) {
      if (!getDeclaredPayload()
          .equals(other.getDeclaredPayload())) return false;
    }
    if (getApprovalRequired()
        != other.getApprovalRequired()) return false;
    if (mode_ != other.mode_) return false;
    if (hasEffectiveTimeUtc() != other.hasEffectiveTimeUtc()) return false;
    if (hasEffectiveTimeUtc()) {
      if (!getEffectiveTimeUtc()
          .equals(other.getEffectiveTimeUtc())) return false;
    }
    if (hasExpiresAtUtc() != other.hasExpiresAtUtc()) return false;
    if (hasExpiresAtUtc()) {
      if (!getExpiresAtUtc()
          .equals(other.getExpiresAtUtc())) return false;
    }
    if (!getComment()
        .equals(other.getComment())) return false;
    if (!getSubject()
        .equals(other.getSubject())) return false;
    if (!getUnknownFields().equals(other.getUnknownFields())) return false;
    return true;
  }

  @java.lang.Override
  public int hashCode() {
    if (memoizedHashCode != 0) {
      return memoizedHashCode;
    }
    int hash = 41;
    hash = (19 * hash) + getDescriptor().hashCode();
    hash = (37 * hash) + CONFIG_ID_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + getConfigId().hashCode();
    hash = (37 * hash) + LAYER_ID_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + getLayerId().hashCode();
    if (hasDeclaredPayload()) {
      hash = (37 * hash) + DECLARED_PAYLOAD_FIELD_NUMBER;
      hash = (53 * hash) + getDeclaredPayload().hashCode();
    }
    hash = (37 * hash) + APPROVAL_REQUIRED_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + com.google.protobuf.Internal.hashBoolean(
        getApprovalRequired());
    hash = (37 * hash) + MODE_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + mode_;
    if (hasEffectiveTimeUtc()) {
      hash = (37 * hash) + EFFECTIVE_TIME_UTC_FIELD_NUMBER;
      hash = (53 * hash) + getEffectiveTimeUtc().hashCode();
    }
    if (hasExpiresAtUtc()) {
      hash = (37 * hash) + EXPIRES_AT_UTC_FIELD_NUMBER;
      hash = (53 * hash) + getExpiresAtUtc().hashCode();
    }
    hash = (37 * hash) + COMMENT_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + getComment().hashCode();
    hash = (37 * hash) + SUBJECT_FIELD_NUMBER;
    hash = (53 * hash) + getSubject().hashCode();
    hash = (29 * hash) + getUnknownFields().hashCode();
    memoizedHashCode = hash;
    return hash;
  }

        publishedBuilder_.dispose();
        publishedBuilder_ = null;
      }
      onChanged();
      return this;
    }
    /**
     * <code>.fabric.config.v1.PublishedConfig published = 6;</code>
     */
    public org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.PublishedConfig.Builder getPublishedBuilder() {
      bitField0_ |= 0x00000020;
      onChanged();
      return internalGetPublishedFieldBuilder().getBuilder();
    }
    /**
     * <code>.fabric.config.v1.PublishedConfig published = 6;</code>
     */
    public org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.PublishedConfigOrBuilder getPublishedOrBuilder() {
      if (publishedBuilder_ != null) {
        return publishedBuilder_.getMessageOrBuilder();
      } else {
        return published_ == null ?
            org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.PublishedConfig.getDefaultInstance() : published_;
      }

  public boolean equals(final java.lang.Object obj) {
    if (obj == this) {
     return true;
    }
    if (!(obj instanceof org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.WorkflowStatus)) {
      return super.equals(obj);
    }

        .equals(other.getConfigId())) return false;

        result.baseEffectiveConfigId_ = baseEffectiveConfigId_;

      if (((from_bitField0_ & 0x00000400) != 0)) {
        result.lastPublishedConfigId_ = lastPublishedConfigId_;
      }
      if (((from_bitField0_ & 0x00000800) != 0)) {
        result.createdTimeUtc_ = createdTimeUtcBuilder_ == null
            ? createdTimeUtc_
            : createdTimeUtcBuilder_.build();
        to_bitField0_ |= 0x00000004;
      }
      if (((from_bitField0_ & 0x00001000) != 0)) {
        result.createdBySubject_ = createdBySubject_;

        result.updatedTimeUtc_ = updatedTimeUtcBuilder_ == null
            ? updatedTimeUtc_

        to_bitField0_ |= 0x00000008;

        result.updatedBySubject_ = updatedBySubject_;

        result.rationale_ = rationale_;

      if (((from_bitField0_ & 0x00010000) != 0)) {
        result.decisionMessage_ = decisionMessage_;
      }
      result.bitField0_ |= to_bitField0_;

    @java.lang.Override

    public Builder mergeFrom(org.pronzato.fabric.service.config.grpc.WorkflowStatus other) {

        bitField0_ |= 0x00001000;

        onChanged();

        decisionMessage_ = other.decisionMessage_;
        bitField0_ |= 0x00010000;
        onChanged();

            audit_ = other.audit_;

            audit_ = other.audit_;

                 internalGetAuditFieldBuilder() : null;

            auditBuilder_.addAllMessages(other.audit_);
          }
        }
      }
      this.mergeUnknownFields(other.getUnknownFields());
      onChanged();
      return this;
    }

    @java.lang.Override
    public Builder mergeFrom(
        com.google.protobuf.CodedInputStream input,
        com.google.protobuf.ExtensionRegistryLite extensionRegistry)
        throws java.io.IOException {
      if (extensionRegistry == null) {
        throw new java.lang.NullPointerException();
      }
      try {
        boolean done = false;
        while (!done) {
          int tag = input.readTag();
          switch (tag) {
            case 0:
              done = true;
              break;
            case 10: {
              group_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000001;
              break;
            } // case 10
            case 18: {
              configId_ = input.readStringRequireUtf8();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000002;
              break;

            case 26: {

              bitField0_ |= 0x00000004;
              break;

              bitField0_ |= 0x00000008;
              break;

            case 40: {

              bitField0_ |= 0x00000010;
              break;

            case 48: {
              mode_ = input.readEnum();
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000020;
              break;

            case 58: {

                  internalGetEffectiveAtUtcFieldBuilder().getBuilder(),
                  extensionRegistry);
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000040;
              break;
            } // case 58
            case 66: {

                  internalGetExpiresAtUtcFieldBuilder().getBuilder(),
                  extensionRegistry);
              bitField0_ |= 0x00000080;
              break;
            } // case 66
            case 74: {

              bitField0_ |= 0x00000100;
              break;
            } // case 74
            case 82: {

              bitField0_ |= 0x00000200;
              break;

              bitField0_ |= 0x00000400;
              break;

            case 98: {

                  internalGetCreatedTimeUtcFieldBuilder().getBuilder(),

              break;

            case 106: {

              bitField0_ |= 0x00001000;
              break;

                  internalGetUpdatedTimeUtcFieldBuilder().getBuilder(),

              break;

        throw e.unwrapIOException();

org.pronzato.fabric.service.data

===== FILE: fabric-lite-services/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/service/data/DataService.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.service.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceHandle;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.service.data.active.ActiveMarketData;

public final class DataService {
  public static void main(String[] args) {
    ServiceHandle queryHandle = null;
    CountDownLatch shutdownSignal = new CountDownLatch(1);

    Runtime.getRuntime()
        .addShutdownHook(
            new Thread(
                () -> {
                  System.out.println("shutdownSignal=received");
                  shutdownSignal.countDown();
                }));

    try (Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                                    .withGroup("platform")
                                    .withName("data")
                                    .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                                    .withKerberosUsername("dfabric")
                                    .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/dfabric.keytab"))
                                    .withKekFile(Path.of("vault", "keks", "platform", "dfabric.kek"))
                                    .build()) {
      session.start();

      List<String> queryable = session.access().queryableDatasets();
      System.out.println("queryableDatasets.count=" + queryable.size());
      queryable.stream().sorted().forEach(id -> System.out.println("queryableDataset=" + id));

      ServiceRunOptions.Builder serviceOptionsBuilder =
          ServiceRunOptions.builder()
              .withTlsCertChain(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.pem"))
              .withTlsPrivateKey(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.key"));
      List<String> datasetScope = List.of("dataset:lab/default/orders",
                                          "dataset:lab/default/positions",
                                          "dataset:platform/default/marketdata");
      if (!datasetScope.isEmpty()) {
        serviceOptionsBuilder.withDatasetIds(datasetScope);
        System.out.println("datasetScope=" + datasetScope);
      } else {
        System.out.println("datasetScope=ALL_VISIBLE_DATASETS");
      }





      ServiceRunOptions serviceOptions = serviceOptionsBuilder.build();

      ActiveMarketData.ensureRegistered(session);
      queryHandle = session.services().start("data", serviceOptions, null);
      System.out.println("queryService=data");

      boolean marketDataStarted = false;
      try {
        ActiveMarketData.start(session, false);
        marketDataStarted = true;
        System.out.println("marketDataStreaming=STARTED ingest=service_market_data_amps_streaming");
        System.out.println("status=RUNNING");
        System.out.println("stopHint=press Ctrl+C");
        shutdownSignal.await();
        System.out.println("status=STOPPING");
      } finally {
        if (marketDataStarted) {
          try {
            ActiveMarketData.stop(session);
          } catch (Exception ignored) {
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (InterruptedException interrupted) {
      Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      throw new IllegalStateException("service interrupted while waiting for shutdown");
    } catch (Throwable error) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(normalizeMessage(error), error);
    } finally {
      if (queryHandle != null) {
        try {
          queryHandle.close();
        } catch (Exception ignored) {
        }
      }
    }

  }

  private static String normalizeMessage(Throwable error) {
    if (error == null) {
      return "unknown failure";
    }
    String message = error.getMessage();
    if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
      return error.getClass().getSimpleName();
    }
    return message;
  }
}

org.pronzato.fabric.service.data.active

===== FILE: fabric-lite-services/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/service/data/active/ActiveMarketData.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.service.data.active;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Objects;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.IngestManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class ActiveMarketData {

  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "marketdata";
  private static final String AMPS_CONNECTION = "amps-fabric-json";
  private static final String AMPS_TOPIC = "/platform/marketdata/json";

  private static final List<String> SYMBOLS = List.of("AAPL", "MSFT", "NVDA", "TSLA");
  private static final List<String> SIDES = List.of("BUY", "SELL");
  private static final long PUBLISH_INTERVAL_MILLIS = 1_000L;
  private static final Object PUBLISH_LOCK = new Object();
  private static final ObjectMapper JSON = new ObjectMapper();

  private static volatile PublisherLoop publisherLoop;

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ActiveMarketData.class);

  private ActiveMarketData() {}

  public static void start(Fabric.Session session, boolean verbose) {
    ensureRegistered(session);

    IngestManager ingest = session.data().direct().ingest();
    ingest.start(INGEST_NAME);
    LOGGER.info("[Service][MarketData][AMPS] started ingest={} target=DUCKDB_ACTIVE", INGEST_NAME);

    startPublisher(session, verbose);
  }

  public static void ensureRegistered(Fabric.Session session) {
    IngestManager ingest = session.data().direct().ingest();
    boolean exists = ingest.exists(INGEST_NAME);
    ingest.admin().register(streamingModel());
    LOGGER.info(
        "[Service][MarketData][AMPS] {} ingest={} topic={} connection={}",
        exists ? "updated" : "registered",
        INGEST_NAME,
        AMPS_TOPIC,
        AMPS_CONNECTION);
  }

  public static void stop(Fabric.Session session) {
    stopPublisher();
    if (session == null) {
      return;
    }
    try {
      session.data().direct().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      LOGGER.info("[Service][MarketData][AMPS] stopped ingest={}", INGEST_NAME);
    } catch (Throwable error) {
      LOGGER.warn(
          "[Service][MarketData][AMPS] stop failed ingest={} message={}",
          INGEST_NAME,
          rootMessage(error));
    }
  }

  private static IngestModel streamingModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("symbol", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("venue", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("bid", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                .withField("ask", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                .withField("last", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                .withField("size", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("side", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("sequence", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("event_time", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, true)
                .withField("event_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceAmps(
                source ->
                    source
                        .withFormat(IngestFormat.JSON)
                        .withConnectionName(AMPS_CONNECTION)
                        .withTopic(AMPS_TOPIC)
                        .withSowSubscribe(false)
                        .withOptions("no_bookmark")
                        .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .addPrimaryKey("symbol")
                    .addPrimaryKey("venue")
                    .addPrimaryKey("side")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static void startPublisher(Fabric.Session session, boolean verbose) {
    synchronized (PUBLISH_LOCK) {
      if (publisherLoop != null && publisherLoop.running()) {
        return;
      }
      PublisherLoop loop = new PublisherLoop(session, verbose);
      publisherLoop = loop;
      loop.start();
      LOGGER.info(
          "[Service][MarketData][AMPS] publisher started symbols={} topic={} intervalMs={}",
          SYMBOLS,
          AMPS_TOPIC,
          PUBLISH_INTERVAL_MILLIS);
    }
  }

  private static void stopPublisher() {
    synchronized (PUBLISH_LOCK) {
      PublisherLoop loop = publisherLoop;
      publisherLoop = null;
      if (loop == null) {
        return;
      }
      loop.stop();
      LOGGER.info("[Service][MarketData][AMPS] publisher stopped topic={}", AMPS_TOPIC);
    }
  }

  private static final class PublisherLoop {
    private final Fabric.Session session;
    private final ExecutorService executor;
    private final AtomicBoolean running;
    private final boolean verbose;
    private final Map<String, Double> midPrices = new LinkedHashMap<>();
    private volatile long sequence;

    private PublisherLoop(Fabric.Session session, boolean verbose) {
      this.session = Objects.requireNonNull(session, "session");
      this.executor = Executors.newSingleThreadExecutor(r -> new Thread(r, "service-marketdata-publisher"));
      this.verbose = verbose;
      this.running = new AtomicBoolean(true);
      this.midPrices.put("AAPL", 212.15d);
      this.midPrices.put("MSFT", 468.40d);
      this.midPrices.put("NVDA", 1197.85d);
      this.midPrices.put("TSLA", 289.55d);
    }

    private boolean running() {
      return running.get();
    }

    private void start() {
      executor.submit(this::runLoop);
    }

    private void stop() {
      running.set(false);
      executor.shutdownNow();
      try {
        if (!executor.awaitTermination(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS)) {
          LOGGER.warn("[Service][MarketData][AMPS] publisher termination timed out");
        }
      } catch (InterruptedException interrupted) {
        Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      }
    }

    private void runLoop() {
      while (running.get()) {
        try (AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(AMPS_CONNECTION)) {
          while (running.get()) {
            publishTick(amps);
            sleepInterval();
          }
        } catch (Throwable error) {
          if (!running.get()) {
            return;
          }
          LOGGER.warn(
              "[Service][MarketData][AMPS] publish loop error topic={} message={}",
              AMPS_TOPIC,
              rootMessage(error));
          sleepInterval();
        }
      }
    }

    private void publishTick(AmpsConnection amps) {
      String nowTs = Instant.now().toString();
      String today = LocalDate.now().toString();
      for (String symbol : SYMBOLS) {
        double previousMid = midPrices.getOrDefault(symbol, 100.0d);
        double drift = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextDouble(-0.40d, 0.40d);
        double mid = Math.max(0.01d, previousMid + drift);
        double spread = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextDouble(0.01d, 0.06d);
        double bid = round4(mid - (spread / 2.0d));
        double ask = round4(mid + (spread / 2.0d));
        double last = round4(mid + ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextDouble(-0.03d, 0.03d));
        long size = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextLong(100L, 5_000L);

        midPrices.put(symbol, mid);
        for (String side : SIDES) {
          Map<String, Object> event = new LinkedHashMap<>();
          event.put("symbol", symbol);
          event.put("bid", bid);
          event.put("ask", ask);
          event.put("last", last);
          event.put("size", size);
          event.put("side", side);
          event.put("venue", "XNAS");
          event.put("sequence", sequence++);
          event.put("event_time", nowTs);
          event.put("event_date", today);
          try {
            String payload = toJson(event);
            amps.publish(AMPS_TOPIC, payload);
            if (verbose) {
              LOGGER.info(">>> {} {}", AMPS_TOPIC, payload);
            }
          } catch (Exception e) {
            LOGGER.info("problem publishing market-data: " + event, e);
          }
        }
      }
    }

    private static void sleepInterval() {
      try {
        Thread.sleep(PUBLISH_INTERVAL_MILLIS);
      } catch (InterruptedException interrupted) {
        Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      }
    }
  }

  private static double round4(double value) {
    return Math.round(value * 10_000d) / 10_000d;
  }

  private static String toJson(Map<String, Object> event) {
    try {
      return JSON.writeValueAsString(event);
    } catch (Exception error) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("unable to serialize market-data event as JSON", error);
    }
  }

  private static String rootMessage(Throwable error) {
    Throwable cursor = error;
    while (cursor != null && cursor.getCause() != null && cursor.getCause() != cursor) {
      cursor = cursor.getCause();
    }
    if (cursor == null) {
      return "unknown error";
    }
    String message = Strings.trimToNull(cursor.getMessage());
    return message == null ? cursor.getClass().getSimpleName() : message;
  }
}
